brief.speaker: carol
brief.text: First task: pull just the names from the client ledger. That's it. No filtering, no sorting. Get used to the shape.

hints.text: Carol: 'You pulled more than names — are you sure you picked the right column?'
Carol: 'Not enough rows. Check your table name?'
Carol: 'The archive threw an error. Did you pick values that exist?'
Carol: 'Close, but not quite. I asked for names from the clients table.'

success.speaker: carol
success.text: Good. Twenty clients, one suspiciously dated — you saw '???' at the bottom, right? We'll come back to that. Next.
